analysis.consistency: Consistent with established D&D 5e class progression for martial classes gaining Extra Attack at level 5.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, concise, and directly mirrors the source material's wording.

mechanics.trigger: Taking the Attack action on your turn
mechanics.effect: Increases the number of attacks made from one to two.
mechanics.balance_assessment: Standard martial power boost appropriate for Tier 2 play (Level 5). Mechanically sound and balanced relative to other classes.

data_issues.suggested_improvements: None required for the provided raw data structure.
